issue_draft.title: [TARS-V2] Implement Context Pruning for Memory Objects
issue_draft.problem_statement: The second-brain memory context grows linearly, leading to context window exhaustion during long agent sessions.
issue_draft.goal: Implement an LRU-based pruning strategy for `MemoryItem` objects before injecting them into the LLM context.
non_goals: Do not implement vector similarity search in this issue.
Do not delete items from the durable memory store.
acceptance_criteria: The function removes the oldest items that exceed a specified token limit.
Tests verify that the most recently accessed items are preserved.
issue_draft.test_plan: Unit tests in `Tars.Tests/MemoryStoreTests.fs` to verify pruning logic and boundary conditions.
stop_conditions: If token counting library cannot be integrated without external dependencies, halt and request review.
